title: Claude Code Leak: What's Happening?
summary: Jordan Urbs analyzes the Claude Code source code leak via a committed NPM map file, discussing Claude Code as a TypeScript harness wrapping an LLM with a 3-layer memory system. The video examines copyright implications under US law, token subsidization economics, telemetry to Datadog, and demonstrates installing the leaked code on a ZimaBoard with Venice AI as an open-source alternative.
